/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libarm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libarm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/arm_interfaces/srv/detail/arm_command__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/arm_interfaces/srv/detail/cargo__type_support.c.o CMakeFiles/arm_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/arm_interfaces/srv/detail/get_target_pose__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/scr/robocup/amr_robot_ws/build/arm_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libarm_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
